news.title: Treasury Market Liquidity Since April 2025
news.desc: NY Fed Liberty Street Economics examines how U.S. Treasury market liquidity evolved over the past year. Liquidity worsened sharply after the April 2025 tariff announcement, quickly recovered once tariff increases were partially rolled back, and remained relatively stable through February 2026 despite subsequent new tariff rounds.

news.title: Fed Balance Sheet & Net Liquidity: TGA at $848B as of April 1, 2026
news.desc: As of April 1, 2026, the Federal Reserve balance sheet totals $4,390B. The Treasury General Account (TGA) stands at $848B. The Fed's shift from QT to Reserve Management Purchases (RMP) continues to support reserve adequacy heading into the debt-ceiling resolution window.

news.title: 美以伊冲突如何重塑美元流动性格局——从预期路径到现实偏离
news.desc: 浙商银行FICC研究：2026年一季度美元流动性呈现分化格局。美联储RMP支撑短端平稳（SOFR-OIS维持约5bp低位），但中长端利率受地缘风险溢价驱动大幅抬升（2年期以上上行40-50bp）。离岸美元及境内美元流动性全面趋紧，境内拆借情绪指数接近历史高位70。
